subparts.text: Why NAND and NOR gates are called universal gates?
What is 10’s complement and 9’s complement representation of a decimal number
What is an instruction cycle and write the phases of instruction cycle.
Explain the function of a 4 bit synchronous clocked shift left register
Explain the functioning of JK flip flop with the help of suitable diagram. What is race around condition?
Explain the functions of address bus, data bus and control bus.

questions.question_text: What is a decoder? Explain 2 to 4 decoder and its function.
What is the function of register transfer language . Explain arithmetic, logic and shift microoperations with its RTL notations
Differentiate between RISC and CISC architecture. Mention there suitable applications also.
Explain various addressing modes with the help of an example.
Write about pipelining and its importance in high speed applications
Explain the difference between isolated and memory mapped .
What is DMA? Explain how DMA bypasses CPU and speeds up the memory operation.
